concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types for the canonical passive-view topology harness.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType, type.viewBucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java' THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Binder.java' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND (sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PresentationModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContributionModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java') THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Contribution.java' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'IntentHandler.java' THEN 'HANDLER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PublishedEvent.java' THEN 'PUBLISHED_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'LEGACY' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS ViewLayerType
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRootEntrypoint RETURN type AS ViewLayerRootEntrypoint

constraint.description: Cockpit topology allows active view Java only in active roots or reusable slotcontent roots.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'LEGACY' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/leftbartabs, src/view/statetabs, src/view/dropdowns, or src/view/slotcontent' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Active view Java must use the cockpit contribution topology.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Component-local view buckets are migration debt and forbidden for active Java.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'LEGACY' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/leftbartabs, src/view/statetabs, src/view/dropdowns, or src/view/slotcontent' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Legacy component-local View/ViewModel/api/assembly-style topology is not active target code.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: View contributions are the only shell-facing view-layer entrypoints.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' AND NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND NOT type.name ENDS WITH 'Contribution' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, '*Contribution' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Each shell-facing view-layer entrypoint must be one contribution.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each contribution, binder, or projection-model source file owns exactly one top-level type.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER', 'MODEL'] AND NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level contribution, binder, or ContributionModel/ContentModel type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A contribution, binder, or ContributionModel/ContentModel file must define exactly one top-level type.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: At least one shell contribution must exist.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRootEntrypoint) WITH count(root) AS rootCount WHERE rootCount = 0 RETURN 'src/view/leftbartabs, src/view/statetabs, or shell-discovered src/view/dropdowns' AS Source, 'at least one shell contribution' AS ExpectedDirection, 'none' AS ActualDirection, 'The shell needs discoverable contributions.' AS Details

constraint.description: Contributions stay thin shell adapters and do not reach forbidden dependencies.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE source.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.host\\..*' OR (target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.api\\..*') OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND ( NOT (target.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER', 'MODEL', 'HANDLER', 'VIEW', 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT', 'PUBLISHED_EVENT']) OR NOT ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND target.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER'] ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'contributions may depend only on shell.api and their Binder' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'View contributions must not depend on domain, data, bootstrap, shell internals, or the wrong view-layer role.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
